title: Better Jungle Temple
description: Minecraft mod that adds a big new jungle temple! ( no overhaul )
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-jungle-temple

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0f126557d4add2e7e6db5c6f6b178e9aafc58a6.png)

![Mod information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9902e7098a8b1eec8b08e75f653176e57f01843b.webp)

This mod adds a new large jungle temple to your Minecraft server. (Contains loot)

This mod does NOT block the normal minecraft jungle temple.

Yes you are allowed to use this in your modpack.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0f126557d4add2e7e6db5c6f6b178e9aafc58a6.png)

![Bug report.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba7b50d6610b0b1fe5b5ea98657365053257fe6.webp)

For bugs or errors you should go to the tab: Issues.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad8011fd56f231dbc6d9cb6a1bc358c3019e56d7.webp)

![super temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ddabacdf40978f92e418367915157fd178c57db.webp)

![temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b8d14e76bdd593a2765ede63b2ddc8d793cf54.png)
